name: Donations & Contributions
description: Individual and member donations supporting reef conservation programs

name: Grant Income
description: Grants from state, federal, and foundation sources

name: Community Outreach
description: Expenses for community programs and reef monitoring events

name: Bank Fees
description: Fees charged by Hawaii Community Federal Credit Union

name: Hawaii Community Federal Credit Union – Checking
description: Primary operating bank account – Coral Futures Institute

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Outstanding grant and contract receivables owed to the institute

name: Accounts Payable
description: Outstanding bills owed by the institute

name: Staff Wages & Payroll
description: Salaries and wages for CFI research and program staff

name: Field Equipment Maintenance
description: Repair and upkeep of dive, survey, and field research equipment

name: Education Program Revenue
description: Revenue from reef education and community outreach programs

name: Hawaii Community FCU – Savings
description: Reserve savings account – Coral Futures Institute

name: Boat Fuel & Field Travel
description: Fuel and travel costs for reaching reef monitoring sites

name: Dive & Survey Gear
description: Dive equipment, transect tapes, quadrats, and field survey supplies

name: Boat & Mooring Fees
description: Research vessel launch and mooring fees at Kaneohe Bay small boat harbor

name: Insurance – Liability & Field
description: Annual general liability and field operations insurance premiums

name: Workshop & Training Revenue
description: Revenue from reef monitoring training workshops and volunteer certification fees

name: Contract Research Income
description: Income from contracted reef survey and data analysis services

name: Field Supplies Inventory
description: Value of field and lab consumable supplies on hand

name: Net Assets – Unrestricted
description: Accumulated unrestricted net assets of the nonprofit

name: Permits & Compliance Fees
description: State and federal research permits, DLNR special-activity permits, and compliance costs
